name: Octorridor
short_description: You're trying to escape from the Magic Academy, but a powerful spell prevents you from exiting the final corridor. It's possible to break the spell if you pass the final corridor an eighth time without fail.
detailed_description:
You're trying to escape from the Magic Academy, but a powerful spell prevents you from exiting the final corridor.

It's possible to break the spell if you pass the final corridor an eighth time without fail.

Rules

Corridor 0 is always correct.

If you see a difference in another corridor, turn around.

If everything is normal, continue straight ahead.

There must be no difference in corridor 8 to exit.

The Game

Octorridor is a small observation duty game that immerses you in a magical, colorful universe, in a liminal space where your goal will be to escape from this labyrinthine corridor by dodging the wrong paths.

Playing time

5 - 60 min

The number of differences

There are a total of 40+ differences.

Enough to vary your searches in the corridor.

Difficulty

You'll need to pay attention to every detail of the corridor to succeed.

The difficulty should be accessible to everyone with a good sense of observation.

Controls

Pc version

W, A, S, D (or Z, Q, S, D) : Move your caracter

Mouse : Look arround

Left Click : Interact (use to open doors)

Shift (hold) : You can sprint !

Esc : Open setting menu

Setting : Sensitivity, Volume

Sensitivity : You can increase or decrease your mouse sensitivity. Default setting is 0,5.

Volume : You can increase or decrease your volume (no anomaly uses sound). Default setting is 50.
